summary: Full backend + frontend test of Arrow Maze. All 10 pytest backend tests pass (health, players idempotent, scores create/sort/no _id, leaderboard global+per-level, stats aggregation, 404s). Frontend mobile UI verified end-to-end via the preview URL on 375x667 viewport: Home brand/hero/chip + 4 menu buttons render; Levels screen shows handcrafted 1-10 tiles + Infinite tile; Level 1 game renders 'LEVEL 1 · FIRST STEPS' header, MOVES counter, timer, and 3 arrow tiles on a 3x3 grid; brute-force solving cleared the board in exactly 3 moves with MOVES counter incrementing only on valid taps; victory overlay shows blue 'Spectacular!' text plus TIME/MOVES stats and Next/Menu buttons; a score POST to /api/scores was confirmed via backend logs; Stats screen renders YOU card with CLEARED/RUNS/MOVES, PERSONAL BESTS, and a populated GLOBAL LEADERBOARD (20 rows visible); player rename via player-name-input + player-name-save successfully updates the displayed name; Infinite mode (/game/infinite) renders 'INFINITE · ROUND 1' with a procedurally generated 4x4 board (8 arrows visible). No critical bugs found. Two minor issues: (a) React-Native-Web deprecation warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' originating from the victory overlay, (b) two DOM nodes share testID 'brand-mark' when navigating back to / because Expo Router web keeps prior screens mounted in the DOM tree.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. The Animated.View at /app/frontend/app/game/[id].tsx around line 341 uses pointerEvents="auto" as a prop. Move it into the style object (style={{ pointerEvents: 'auto' }}) for React Native Web 0.19+/RN 0.74+ compatibility.

Two DOM nodes share data-testid="brand-mark" once the user has navigated to a child screen and then back to /. Expo Router web keeps previous screens mounted under display:none, which causes selectors like wait_for_selector('[data-testid="brand-mark"]') to time out on 'visible'. Same pattern likely affects other home testIDs (menu-play-button, hero-title). Consider using unstable_settings or removing display:none stale screens, or making testIDs only render on the active screen.

action_items: Replace pointerEvents="auto" prop on the victory Animated.View in app/game/[id].tsx with style.pointerEvents to silence the RN Web deprecation warning.

Optional: investigate Expo Router behaviour where prior screens remain in the DOM under hidden wrappers, causing duplicate testIDs (low priority — does not affect end-user functionality, only test brittleness; use selector.first or scope by visibility in further tests).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean, async, excludes _id with projection on every query and via _serialize helper. Idempotent POST /players verified.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL via api.ts, no hardcoded URLs sighted.
All interactive elements have testID. Text wrapped in <Text>. No HTML primitives. StyleSheet.create() used everywhere.
No deprecated Expo packages (expo-av, expo-barcode-scanner, expo-background-fetch) detected in package.json.
seed_data_creation: Test scores/players created with TEST_ prefix during pytest run (TEST_<uuid> player names + TEST_LVL_<id> level ids). Live leaderboard now contains these TEST_ entries; main agent may optionally clean them up later but they do not affect production correctness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is healthy at https://maze-flow-play.preview.emergentagent.com/api. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_arrow_maze_api.py -v. For frontend playwright tests be aware Expo Router keeps prior screens mounted in the web DOM so common testIDs like brand-mark can appear twice — use .first or scope to visible. Level 1 (id='1') is solvable in 3 moves via brute-forcing each remaining arrow-tile-{r}-{c}. Victory overlay carries testID 'victory-text' with text 'Spectacular!'.
